prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PKSLUICEBOX-12X3 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 12" Gold Panning Aluminum Mini Sluice Box with Rubber Matting (Aluminum) Description: The ASR Outdoor Pocket Mini Aluminum Sluice Box is only 12 inches in length by 3.5 inches wide, making it is ideal for fine gold recovery, while being incredibly lightweight and easy to carry. Ready to deploy and use out of the box. No assembly or tools required! The sluice box also comes with two glass collection vials for gold flake and fine gold that is found through your gold panning efforts; rubber groove sluice matting is also included.

This is the perfect companion for you to use while processing your gold concentrate. Ideal for fine sand processing after classifying raw sediment through a 1/20" material sifting screen, the grooved rubber sluice box matting is sure to pick up all of your fine gold pickers and small gold flake. Woven vinyl miners moss carpet can also be used in this mini sluice box and can be switched out simply by removing the wingnut and washer that holds everything in place; no tools required.

Sure this ASR Outdoor Mini Sluice Box could be used in the field while you survey new gold prospecting claims before packing in your large equipment but, it is much more practical for use at home or in the foreman trailer to evaluate your concentrate. Likewise, this is a fun unit for beginners and classrooms to jump start their luck and understanding of gold prospecting with mail order pay dirt, without breaking the bank first. Just spoon feed your sifted material through the channel and provide a flow of water and watch the gold flakes appear on the ribbed rubber matting.

Start to find gold today with this complete mini sluice box set up that comes complete with sluice matting, angled mesh and grooved ribbed rubber mat. It is made from rust resistant aluminum and will last for many years to come as this is a high-quality gold prospecting and mining equipment tool.

Have a complete compact gold prospecting sluice box anywhere you are with the ASR Outdoor compact aluminum mini gold panning pocket sluice box for fine gold recovery. Search Terms: mini sluice box prospecting equipment miners moss gold panning sluice matting for fine gold recovery high banker mining tools mat sluce Features: - NO ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Ready to use out of the box; Uses wing nut closures for easy set up; No tools required; Run gold paydirt and processed concentrate to maximize your gold recovery efforts - COMPACT AND PORTABLE: At only 12” length by 3.5” wide with 1.5" high channel walls, this aluminum pocket mini sluice box is easy to pack up in your hiking backpack for your next gold prospecting adventure - EASY TO USE: Just feed your gold rich paydirt over a moving waterflow through the sluice box channel and watch as the riffles create turbulance in the water depositing the heavy material of fine gold and nuggets within them - RUBBER SLUICE BOX MATTING: Includes V-Shape ribbed rubber sluice box matting; Optional woven vinyl miners moss carpet can be installed under the rustproof angled mesh channel inserts if desired - LIGHTWEIGHT AND WEATHERPROOF: Constructed from rust resistant aluminum this mini pocket sluice box is durable and built to last; ideal for fine gold recovery from your tailings or concentrate === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
